metodos.codigoOriginal:
LParameters plTipo

Local lcOrdemConta

lcOrdemConta = Upper(Iif(Type('Thisform.cOrdConta')='C', Thisform.cOrdConta, ''))

Select TmpCabec
If Not Empty(lcOrdemConta) And InList(lcOrdemConta, 'ENTREGA', 'EMPDOPNUM')
	Set Order To &lcOrdemConta.
Else
	Set Order To EmpDopNum
	Thisform.cOrdConta = Order('TmpCabec')
EndIf

If plTipo
	lnRGB4 = RGB(192,192,192)
	lnRGB7 = RGB(192,192,192)
	Do Case
		Case (Upper(Thisform.cOrdConta) = 'EMPDOPNUM')
			lnRGB4 = RGB(220,255,220)

		Case (Upper(Thisform.cOrdC... [TRUNCADO]

LParameters _ParentForm, _Data, _ReservaAuto, pCnx, _nGerEmphPdr, _Autom, _NumeroOp

=fConfigGeral()

ThisForm.cntSombra.lblSombra.Caption = ThisForm.Caption
ThisForm.cntSombra.lblTitulo.Caption = ThisForm.Caption

If (Type('pCnx') <> 'O')
	=Messagebox('Năo Foi Passado o Parâmetro da Conexăo!!!', 32, 'Contate o Suporte Técnico!!!' )
	Return .f.
EndIf

ThisForm.ParentForm    = _ParentForm
ThisForm.Datasessionid = _Data
ThisForm.Reserva       = _ReservaAuto
ThisForm.poDataMgr 	   = pCnx
ThisForm.P... [TRUNCADO]

Lparameters nColIndex

Select TmpItens
Set Order to EmpDopNum
Set Key To TmpCabec.Emps + TmpCabec.Dopes + Str(TmpCabec.Numes, 6)
Go Top

ThisForm.getCliente.Refresh 
ThisForm.ObsOperaçăo.Refresh
ThisForm.GradeItens.Refresh
ThisForm.ObsItens.Refresh
* Fim **************************************************************************************

If (Upper(Order('TmpCabec')) <> 'EMPDOPNUM')
	Select TmpCabec
	Set Order to EmpDopNum
	ThisForm.gradeoperaçăo.Refresh
	Go Top
	Thisform.cOrdConta = Upper(Order('TmpCabec'))
	With Thisform.gradeoperaçăo
		.Column2.Header1.BackColor = RGB(220,255,220)
		.Column5.Header1.BackColor = RGB(192,192,192)
		.Refresh
	EndWith
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************

If (Upper(Order('TmpCabec')) <> 'ENTREGA')
	Select TmpCabec
	Set Order to Entrega
	ThisForm.gradeoperaçăo.Refresh
	Go Top
	Thisform.cOrdConta = Upper(Order('TmpCabec'))
	With Thisform.gradeoperaçăo
		.Column2.Header1.BackColor = RGB(192,192,192) 
		.Column5.Header1.BackColor = RGB(220,255,220)
		.Refresh
	EndWith
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Private pEdI, pEdF, pItn

Select TmpCabec
Set Order To EmpDopNum

_Contador = 0
Go top
lcJob = TmpCabec.Jobs
Scan For Flag
	_Contador = _Contador + 1
	*** Tiago - 10/04/2014 - SRCOM - Alterado para checar operaçőes com JOB diferente
	If lcJob <> TmpCabec.Jobs
		Messagebox([Năo é permitido gerar OPs de operaçőes com Jobs diferentes.],48,[Aviso])
		Return .f.
	Endif	
EndScan

If (_Contador = 0)
	=Messagebox('Nenhuma Operaçăo Foi Selecionada!!!', 32, '')
	ThisForm.GradeOperaçăo.Column1.SetFocus
	Re... [TRUNCADO]

Replace all Flag With .f. In TmpCabec
ThisForm.GradeOperaçăo.Refresh

Replace all Flag With .t. In TmpCabec
ThisForm.GradeOperaçăo.Refresh
